liveRuns.endpoint: 2FA-enabled staging (webui v26.1.0-alpha, ~1 month older than this branch)

admin.note: session lifecycle (create→RUNNING→terminate) PASSED; 1 failure + later 5 user-run failures are cross-version UI skew vs the older staging, expected to pass against a version-matched install (doctor in FR-2878 will warn on mismatch); 2 skips are documented version-gated Agent Stats widget guards

user.note: role auto-detection resolved 'user'; failures are the vfolder explorer cross-version skew

verification.notes: FR-C is PARTIAL because storage-state reuse, doctor command, and rich diagnostic block are intentionally deferred to Phase 2 (FR-2878 / FR-2879). The @smoke-any tag from FR-A was dropped — see spec FR-A NOTE. verify.sh ALL PASS (Relay/Lint/Format/TypeScript/Vite). Role-exclusive grep partition verified via playwright --list (admin 17 / user 7, zero cross-role contamination) and 13 regex unit cases.
